title: Prosecution's Submission of the List of Evidence
text:
ICC-01/11-01/25-93 26-03-2026 1/3 PT
Original: English No.: ICC-01/11-01/25
Date: 26 March 2026
PRE-TRIAL CHAMBER I
Before: Judge Iulia Antoanella Motoc, Presiding Judge
Judge María del Socorro Flores Liera
Judge Reine Adélaïde Sophie Alapini-Gansou
SITUATION IN LIBYA
IN THE CASE OF
THE PROSECUTOR v. KHALED MOHAMED ALI EL HISHRI
Public
with Confidential Annex 1
Prosecution's submission of the List of Evidence
Source: Office of the Prosecutor
No. ICC- 01/11-01/25 1/3 26 March 2026

ICC-01/11-01/25-93 26-03-2026 2/3 PT
Document to be notified in accordance with regulation 31 of the Regulations of the Court to:
☒ The Office of the Prosecutor ☒ Counsel for the Defence
☐ Legal Representatives of the Victims ☐ Legal Representatives of the Appli-
cants
☐ Unrepresented Victims ☐ Unrepresented Applicants (Partici-
pation/Reparation)
☒ The Office of Public Counsel for ☐ The Office of Public Counsel for the
Victims Defence
☐ States’ Representatives ☐ Amicus Curiae
REGISTRY
Registrar ☐ Counsel Support Section
M. Zavala Giler, Osvaldo
☐ Victims and Witnesses Unit ☐ Detention Section
☐ Victims Participation and Repara- ☐ Other
tions Section
No. ICC- 01/11-01/25 2/3 26 March 2026

ICC-01/11-01/25-93 26-03-2026 3/3 PT
A. INTRODUCTION
1. The Prosecution hereby submits its List of Evidence, pursuant to Article 61(3)(b) of the
Rome Statute, rule 121(3) and 9 of the Rules of Procedure and Evidence and in compliance
with the Chamber’s order.1 The List of Evidence is limited to the items relied upon in the Pre-
Confirmation Brief and its Annexes. The List of Evidence is appended as Annex 1.
B. CLASSIFICATION
2. This notification is filed as public. Annex 1 is filed as confidential, pursuant to regulation
23bis(1) of the Regulations of the Court, because it includes information about the Prosecu-
tion’s evidence, including sensitive witness information.
______________________________________________
Nazhat Shameem Khan
Deputy Prosecutor
Dated this 26th day of March 2026
At The Hague, The Netherlands
1 ICC-01/11-01/25-66.
No. ICC- 01/11-01/25 3/3 26 March 2026
